_description: Template configuration for a chunking benchmark run. Copy this file, fill in your dataset details, and pass it to the benchmark runner. All array values should be adjusted to match your dataset dimensions.

candidate_chunks._description: Spatial-optimized: large spatial dims, small time dim
Temporal-optimized: large time dim, small spatial dims
Balanced: moderate size in all dimensions
Fine-grained: small chunks for high parallelism

access_patterns._description: Time series at a single spatial point
access_patterns.name: temporal

access_patterns._description: Spectral or band access across a subset
access_patterns.name: spectral
